name: Eggplant and Buckwheat Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam eggplant in a vegetable steamer for 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender. Transfer to a glass or ceramic bowl and toss with garlic, lemon juice, lemon rind, and olive oil. Set aside to marinate for 1 hour.
2. Finely chop the marinated eggplant mixture in a food processor or blender, along with the marinating liquid.
3. Meanwhile, heat butter and brown onions in a large skillet. Cool, then add the remaining ingredients, except corn oil. Stir in the chopped eggplant. The mixture should be fairly stiff; add a little more flour if necessary.
4. Heat corn oil in another large skillet. Drop the mixture by the tablespoon into hot oil and fry until golden brown on each side. Drain on paper towels.
5. Serve hot.
